description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on push events. The workflow should have three jobs: clang-cl, msvc, and mingw. The clang-cl and msvc jobs run on a windows-2025 environment, check out the repository, cache CPM.cmake packages, and then configure and build a project using CMake with clang-cl and MSVC, respectively, and run unit tests. The mingw job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a Fedora container, installs dependencies, checks out the repository, and builds the project using CMake and MinGW.
